summary: Iteration 242 - Resonance Streak Mechanic + External Organic Audio Testing Complete. Backend: 6/6 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified. New features: POST /api/phonic/streak-check increments streak when score >= 75, triggers at 3+ consecutive with xp_awarded=50, resets to 0 on low score. GET /api/phonic/streak-status returns current streak state. SovereignHUD shows streak-counter badge when streak > 0, streak-panel with dots/best/XP in expanded view, golden-pulse overlay on trigger, xp-flash animation. useOrganicAudio hook exports playVoice, getInstrument, playAmbientForRoute. OrganicAudioProvider renders in OrbitalNavigation. ROUTE_INSTRUMENTS maps meditation→singing_bowl, star-chart→flute, elixirs→tabla, frequencies→crystal_bowl. Service Worker sw.js includes INSTRUMENT_PROFILES and INSTRUMENT_CACHE.

issues: Trial graduation overlay appears on login - expected behavior for test user with concluded trial. Click 'Continue with free plan' to dismiss.

critical_code_review_comments: phonic.py lines 384-447: POST /api/phonic/streak-check endpoint with SessionResonanceData model
phonic.py: streak-check calculates score from total_resonances*4 + active_pairs*8 + interval_bonus (octave=15, fifth=10, fourth=8, third=5)
phonic.py: Streak logic: score >= 75 increments, < 75 resets to 0. Triggers at 3+ consecutive (every 3rd streak awards XP)
phonic.py: XP formula: 50 base + ((streak // 3) - 1) * 25 per additional 3-streak cycle
phonic.py lines 450-458: GET /api/phonic/streak-status returns current_streak, best_streak, streak_active, total_xp_earned, last_score
SovereignHUD.js lines 44-46: streak state with goldenPulse and xpFlash
SovereignHUD.js lines 106-120: streak-check called in requestIdleCallback after harmony-score fetch
SovereignHUD.js lines 213-228: golden-pulse overlay with AnimatePresence, 3s animation
SovereignHUD.js lines 232-248: xp-flash animation showing +XP earned
SovereignHUD.js lines 293-303: streak-counter badge in collapsed HUD
SovereignHUD.js lines 448-490: streak-panel with dots, best streak, total XP
useOrganicAudio.js lines 11-30: ROUTE_INSTRUMENTS mapping (meditation→singing_bowl, star-chart→flute, elixirs→tabla, frequencies→crystal_bowl)
useOrganicAudio.js lines 33-64: createSingingBowl with 4 harmonics + slow beating
useOrganicAudio.js lines 66-113: createFlute with triangle wave + vibrato LFO + breath noise
useOrganicAudio.js lines 115-148: createTabla with pitch sweep + noise burst
useOrganicAudio.js lines 150-180: createCrystalBowl with pure harmonics + shimmer
useOrganicAudio.js lines 191-242: useOrganicAudio hook exports playVoice, getInstrument, playAmbientForRoute
OrbitalNavigation.js lines 21-45: OrganicAudioProvider component with 2.5s delay after route change
OrbitalNavigation.js line 126: OrganicAudioProvider rendered with enabled={!!token}
sw.js lines 6, 12-17: INSTRUMENT_CACHE and INSTRUMENT_PROFILES constants
sw.js lines 68-74: Pre-caches instrument profiles as JSON
sw.js lines 97-104: /instruments/ handler serves from INSTRUMENT_CACHE
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 242 verified: (1) POST /api/phonic/streak-check increments current_streak when score >= 75 (calculated from total_resonances*4 + active_pairs*8 + interval_bonus). (2) After 3 consecutive high scores, streak_triggered=true and xp_awarded=50. (3) Low score resets streak to 0. (4) GET /api/phonic/streak-status returns current_streak, best_streak, streak_active, total_xp_earned, last_score. (5) SovereignHUD at bottom-20 left-4 shows streak-counter badge when streak > 0. (6) Expanded HUD shows streak-panel with streak dots, best streak, and total XP. (7) golden-pulse overlay (data-testid='golden-pulse') appears on streak trigger with 3s animation. (8) xp-flash (data-testid='xp-flash') shows +XP earned. (9) useOrganicAudio hook in /hooks/useOrganicAudio.js exports playVoice, getInstrument, playAmbientForRoute. (10) ROUTE_INSTRUMENTS maps meditation→singing_bowl, star-chart→flute, elixirs→tabla, frequencies→crystal_bowl. (11) OrganicAudioProvider in OrbitalNavigation.js plays instrument voice 2.5s after route change. (12) Service Worker sw.js includes INSTRUMENT_CACHE and INSTRUMENT_PROFILES for offline support. (13) App compiles with only 2 warnings (third-party source map issues). (14) /mastery-path page loads correctly. (15) All regression tests pass: harmony-score, culture-layers.
